calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-02-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-02-2003 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conerence this day.
Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR: Deborha Neville.
Plaintiff: Paul Chan present with counsel, Gilbert Jay.
No appearance by the defendant. Parties settled prior to today's conference, per written stiupulation presented by counsel in open court. Trial date vacated.
